name: Destiny Eau de Parfum
short: A green, aromatic eau de parfum capturing destiny's essence with rich, timeless notes.
description: Destiny is a green, aromatic eau de parfum that opens with a crisp burst of galbanum and green leaves, blooms into a heart of fig and violet, and settles into a warm, woody base of vetiver, cedar, and musk. Composed at high concentration for a distinctive, lasting sillage. Hand-filled and finished in our Udaipur atelier. A scent for those who trust the path they're on — quietly confident, unmistakably themselves.
benefits: Green, aromatic composition with fig and violet heart
Weighted glass flacon with brass-tone cap
usage: Spritz onto pulse points — wrists, neck, behind the ears — from a distance of 6 inches. Do not rub. Reapply as desired. A distinctive signature scent for day or evening.
